{"code":"(def merged-prs (github__list_pull_requests {:state "merged"}))
(def closing-prs (filter :closes_linear merged-prs))
(def results
  (for [pr closing-prs]
    (let [linear-id (:closes_linear pr)
          issue (linear__get_issue {:id linear-id})]
      {:pr-number (:number pr)
       :linear-id linear-id
       :linear-state (:state issue)})))
